title: Presentation Overview
subtitle: A 90-minute discussion framework for ADAC × HMC outpatient cooperation
summary: Single-page agenda that frames the eight topics this meeting covers.

items.title: Why HMC
items.summary: HMC's Red Sea medical network and operational capability.

items.title: ADAC Track Record
items.summary: Verified case history, German traveler volume, and ADAC's position as the leading German insurance partner.

items.title: Red Sea Coverage
items.summary: 10 HMC locations plus hotel-zone and mobile coverage.

items.title: Outpatient Package Framework
items.summary: Flat-rate clinical packages for common tourist medical scenarios.

items.title: Service Delivery Modes
items.summary: Clinic visit, hotel room visit, and mobile clinic unit.

items.title: Documentation & SLA
items.summary: Same-day reports, package-coded invoices, and clear response targets.

items.title: Pricing & Pilot
items.summary: Negotiable package framework with a proposed 3-month pilot.

items.title: Discussion & Next Steps
items.summary: Scope, pricing, communication channels, reporting, and pilot approval.
